assertions.text: First sentence is the news hook with no preamble
No marketing language such as revolutionary, game-changing, or exciting opportunity
Key messages are numbered and stated in one sentence each
Anticipated questions are in journalist register, not internal language
Every topic-to-avoid has corresponding bridging language, not just a prohibition
No 'just checking in,' 'circling back,' 'touching base,' or similar dead phrases
Closing ask is a single specific action
First sentence references the specific thing being thanked for
Email does not read as 'thanks for the coverage, here is my next pitch'
